full_text:
Luo Jun (Xiaoyuan) 駱俊 (孝遠)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Luo Jun (駱俊), styledXiaoyuan (孝遠), was born in Kuaiji. Many children were named after him. Killed by Yuan Shu’s agents over supplies. Luo Jun was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and Liu Chong. Luo Jun lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
